channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-17762] sanity test_60a: FAIL: run-llog.sh failed
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for jianyu <yujian@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/9e79fe6a-4f12-43bf-bcfb-94f2c242fbdb

test_60a failed with the following error:

onyx-112vm7: + echo 'NOW reload debugging syms..'
onyx-112vm7: + RC=0
onyx-112vm7: + eval '/usr/sbin/lctl <<-EOF || RC=2
onyx-112vm7: 	attach llog_test llt_name llt_uuid
onyx-112vm7: 	ignore_errors
onyx-112vm7: 	setup MGS
onyx-112vm7: 	--device llt_name cleanup
onyx-112vm7: 	--device llt_name detach
onyx-112vm7: EOF'
onyx-112vm7: ++ /usr/sbin/lctl
onyx-112vm7: error: setup: Invalid argument
onyx-112vm7: ++ RC=2
onyx-112vm7: + /usr/sbin/lctl dl
onyx-112vm7: + rmmod -v llog_test
onyx-112vm7: + '[' 2 -eq 0 ']'
onyx-112vm7: + exit 2
pdsh@onyx-112vm1: onyx-112vm7: ssh exited with exit code 2

Test session details:
clients: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/104080 - 4.18.0-513.18.1.el8_9.x86_64
servers: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-reviews/104080 - 4.18.0-513.18.1.el8_lustre.x86_64

<<Please provide additional information about the failure here>>

Dmesg on MGS node:

Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: == sanity test 60a: llog_test run from kernel module and test llog_reader ========================================================== 05:39:38 (1712900378)
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: ! which run-llog.sh &> /dev/null
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl mark test_60 run 23859 - from kernel mode
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: test_60 run 23859 - from kernel mode
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl dk > /dev/null 
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: bash run-llog.sh
Lustre: 384384:0:(llog_test.c:2291:llog_test_setup()) Setup llog-test device over MGS device
Lustre: 384384:0:(llog_test.c:96:llog_test_1()) 1a: create a log with name: 1cd2fdd
Lustre: 384384:0:(llog_test.c:113:llog_test_1()) 1b: close newly-created log
Lustre: 384384:0:(llog_test.c:144:llog_test_2()) 2a: re-open a log with name: 1cd2fdd
Lustre: 384384:0:(llog_test.c:164:llog_test_2()) 2b: create a log without specified NAME & LOGID
Lustre: 384384:0:(llog_test.c:182:llog_test_2()) 2b: write 1 llog records, check llh_count
Lustre: 384384:0:(llog_test.c:195:llog_test_2()) 2c: re-open the log by LOGID and verify llh_count
LustreError: 384384:0:(llog_osd.c:268:llog_osd_read_header()) lustre-MDT0000-osd: bad log  [0x1:0x1a:0x0] header magic: 0x0 (expected 0x10645539)
LustreError: 384384:0:(llog_test.c:204:llog_test_2()) 2c: can't init llog handle: -22
LustreError: 384384:0:(obd_config.c:797:class_setup()) setup llt_name failed (-22)
LustreError: 384384:0:(obd_config.c:850:class_cleanup()) Device 36 not setup
Lustre: DEBUG MARKER: /usr/sbin/lctl mark  sanity test_60a: @@@@@@ FAIL: run-llog.sh failed

VVVVVVV DO NOT REMOVE LINES BELOW, Added by Maloo for auto-association VVVVVVV
sanity test_60a - run-llog.sh failed

status.description: The issue is open and ready for the assignee to start work on it.
